mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORKPLACE_NOTICES (WORKPLACE_ID, AUTHOR_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, IS_PINNED) VALUES (#{workplaceId}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{pinned})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, AUTHOR_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, IS_PINNED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM WORKPLACE_NOTICES WHERE WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} ORDER BY IS_PINNED DESC, CREATED_AT DESC
